llm_response:
Here are the answers to the Pauli operator multiplication problems:

(1) Input: $ (X_{0}) (+i X_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iI

(2) Input: $ (-i Z_{0}) (+i Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +I

(3) Input: $ (- Z_{0}) (-i X_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iY_{0}

(4) Input: $ (-i Z_{0}) (-i Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: -iX_{0}

(5) Input: $ (X_{0}) (+i X_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iI

(6) Input: $ (-i Z_{0}) (X_{0}) $
    Your Answer: -iY_{0}

(7) Input: $ (-i Z_{0}) (- Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iI

(8) Input: $ (I) (+i Y_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iY_{0}

(9) Input: $ (-i X_{0}) (+i Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +iY_{0}

(10) Input: $ (Y_{0}) (-i Z_{0}) $
    Your Answer: +X_{0}
